sections.a_eyebrow: Full Bleed · Heavy Motion · Immersive · Dramatic · Modern
sections.a_description: The distinctive visual language of Video Background — combining full bleed, heavy motion, immersive elements to create interfaces that are immediately recognizable and purposefully designed. Every color, font choice, and spacing decision works together to evoke the specific mood and cultural context that defines this aesthetic, from the primary accent color to the carefully chosen typography.

This style finds its natural home across websites and applications that value full bleed and heavy motion design principles. You'll see it on creative portfolios, brand microsites, specialized platforms, and digital experiences where the visual language itself communicates as powerfully as the content — proving that the right aesthetic choice can transform a standard layout into a memorable experience.

a_image_cover.alt: Video Background style use case illustration
Video Background style use case illustration
Video Background style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The distinctive visual aesthetic of Video Background — a design approach that creates unique, memorable interfaces. Background: dark (#0a0a0a). The .inner panel has a slightly lighter background with subtle border treatment and appropriate border-radius. Colors: #ffffff as the primary accent for interactive elements and highlights. #ffffff for headings, #aaaaaa for body text. The aesthetic captures the essence of video background through careful color choices, spacing, and visual weight. Set in Poppins — chosen for its visual character that complements this design style. Heading at weight 600-700, 24-28px, line-height 1.2-1.3. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2-3px letter-spacing, color #ffffff. Body at weight 400, 14-15px, line-height 1.6-1.7, color #aaaaaa. Buttons: primary — #ffffff background with contrasting text. Secondary: transparent with #ffffff border. Alternatives: system-ui (universal fallback), sans-serif stack.
